title: Cyrtochilum quinqueseriale
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum quinqueseriale is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions. This species is further classified within the genus Cyrtochilum, which comprises over 200 species of orchids. Cyrtochilum quinqueseriale is often found growing on trees and other vegetation in its native habitat. The classification of Cyrtochilum quinqueseriale as an orchid species is confirmed by its distinctive flowers and growth habits.
